---
title: "CRESCENT Figures 1c, 3a, 3c, S3, S6"
output: html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

#Dataframes, libraries
```{r}
library(NatParksPalettes)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readxl)
library(hrbrthemes)
library(viridis)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(ggprism)
library(ggpubr)
library(ape)
library(vegan)
library(readr)
library(pheatmap)
library(reshape2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(qqman)
library(writexl)
library(UpSetR)
library(lubridate)


colors <- c(
  "Patient" = "#D76E9A",
  "Sink" = "#A1ACC8",
  "hosp_discharge" = "#2F397A",
  "icu_admit" = "#7391BD",
  "icu_discharge" = "#894846",
  "sink_drain" = "#E9988C",
  "sink_surface" = "#535260",
  "no" = "#894846",
  "yes" = "#E9988C",
  "1" = "#8C2B0E",
  "2" = "#A6471C",
  "3" = "#C0642A",
  "4" = "#DA853D",
  "5" = "#F5A752",
  "6" = "#B58A59",
  "7" = "#494D5A",
  "8" = "#1E3A67",
  "9" = "#34507F",
  "10" = "#485A85",
  "11" = "#594D67",
  "14" = "#6D4752",
  "15" = "#90626A",
  "none" = "#B47E83",
  "Enterobacter species" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Enterobacter chengduensis" = "#A6CEE3",
  "Enterobacter cloacae" = "#1F78B4",
  "Enterobacter cloacae subsp. cloacae" = "#B2DF8A",
  "Enterobacter hormaechei" = "#33A02C",
  "Enterobacter roggenkampii" = "#FB9A99",
  "Enterobacter sichuanensis" = "#E31A1C",
  "Escherichia coli" = "#FDBF6F",
  "Escherichia coli K-12" = "#FF7F00",
  "Klebsiella aerogenes" = "#CAB2D6",
  "Klebsiella pneumoniae" = "#6A3D9A",
  "Klebsiella pneumoniae subsp. pneumoniae" = "#FFFF99",
  "Klebsiella quasipneumoniae" = "#B15928",
  "Klebsiella sp. 10982" = "grey85", 
  "Enterobacter" = "#1F78B4", 
  "Klebsiella" = "#6A3D9A",
  "Escherichia" = "#FDBF6F", 
  "Hospital-acquired" = "#BBD8B3", 
  "Healthcare-associated" = "#F3B61F", 
  "Community-associated" = "#F1EF93",
   "Hospital acquired" = "#BBD8B3", 
  "Healthcare associated" = "#F3B61F", 
  "Community" = "#F1EF93",
  "Environmental Swab" = "#64A253", 
    "Environmental swab" = "#64A253",
  "External isolate" = "#919191", 
  "CRESCENT" = "#E9988C", 
  "Undetermined" = "#919191", 
  "Negative for CRE" = "#ebeae8", 
  "S" = "#8FCAFD",  "SDD" = "#4499F5", "I" = "#CD622E", "R" =  "#832B0F"
)


formatted_date <- format(Sys.Date(), "%y%m%d")

script_dir <- dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path)
setwd(script_dir)


amrfinder <- read_excel("../data/CRESCENT_amrfinder_results.xlsx", sheet = "CRESCENT_amrfinder_results")

# Filter rows where Element type is "AMR"
amrfinder <- amrfinder %>%
  filter(`Element type` == "AMR")

metadata <- read_excel("../data/250424_WGSIDs-to-keep_LRH.xlsx", sheet = "metadata_new")
plasmidfinder <- read_excel("../data/241015_Plasmidfinder-results_LRH.xlsx", sheet = "241015_Plasmidfinder-results_LR")

metadata$Sample <- gsub("[.-]", "_", metadata$Sample)
amrfinder$Name <- gsub("[.-]", "_", amrfinder$Name)

 metadata <- metadata %>%
  separate(Mash, into = c("genus", "species"), sep = " ", extra = "merge", remove = FALSE)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(Mash = case_when(
    Mash == "Klebsiella pneumoniae subsp. pneumoniae" ~ "Klebsiella pneumoniae",
    Mash == "Enterobacter cloacae subsp. cloacae" ~ "Enterobacter cloacae",
    Mash == "Escherichia coli K-12" ~ "Escherichia coli",
    TRUE ~ Mash
  ))

amrfinder <- amrfinder %>%
  filter(!grepl("Name", Name))

amrfinder_metadata <- amrfinder %>%
  inner_join(metadata, by = c("Name" = "Sample"))

amrfinder_metadata_plasmid <- amrfinder_metadata %>%
  left_join(plasmidfinder, by = c("Contig id" = "Contig"))

length(unique(amrfinder_metadata_plasmid$Name.x))

metadata$Sample <- gsub("[.-]", "_", metadata$Sample)

date_acquisition <- read_excel("../data/241101_CRESCENT-Original_data.xlsx", sheet="dates")
  
AST_patient <- read_xlsx("/Users/lindseyhall/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/Crescent/manuscript/Supplemental_Tables/250424/250326_SupplementalX-AST_LRH.xlsx", sheet = "Patient isolates AST")

AST_environmental <- read_xlsx("/Users/lindseyhall/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/Crescent/manuscript/Supplemental_Tables/250424/250326_SupplementalX-AST_LRH.xlsx", sheet = "Environmental isolates AST")

# addition from eeb - updated swab results
updated_swabs = data.frame(read_excel('../manuscript/Supplemental_Tables/250908_supplemental_tables_SG/250812_SupplementalTable1-SwabResults_LRH_SG_8.30.25.xlsx'))

EX_amrfinder <- read_tsv("../data/241216_samples_and_other_amrfinder_compiled_LRH.tsv")
EX_metadata <- read_csv("../data/241216_CRESCENT_pt_mash_mlst_ani.csv") 

```

#Figure 1c
```{r}
#---------------------TIMELINE---------------------
data <- date_acquisition

setdiff(updated_swabs$Study_id, data$study_id2)

updated_swabs = updated_swabs[,c("Study_id","Swabs.result"), drop = F]
colnames(updated_swabs)[1] = "study_id2"
updated_swabs = updated_swabs[updated_swabs$study_id2 %in% data$study_id2,]

data = full_join(data, updated_swabs)

# Replace spaces with underscores in the column names
colnames(data) <- gsub(" ", "_", colnames(data))

data$hospital_admit <- as.Date(data$hospital_admit, format="%m/%d/%y")

data_long <- data %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Orgaism1_name),  
               names_to = "organism_type",  
               values_to = "organism_name") %>%
  mutate(week_start = floor_date(hospital_admit, "week"), 
         year = year(hospital_admit)) 

# Replace "ECOLI?" with "Undetermined" and "KP10982" with "Klebsiella pneumoniae"
data_long <- data_long %>%
  mutate(organism_name = case_when(
    organism_name == "ECOLI? KPNE?" ~ "Undetermined",  
    organism_name == "KP10982" ~ "Klebsiella pneumoniae",  
    TRUE ~ organism_name
  ))


data_long$Swabs.result[data_long$Swabs.result != "Negative on admission and did not acquire CRE during hospital stay" & 
                         data_long$Swabs.result != "CRE positive on admission to SICU" & 
                         data_long$Swabs.result != "CRE acqusition on SICU discharge" &
                         data_long$Swabs.result != "CRE acquisition on hospital discharge"] = "Lost to attrition"

data_count <- data_long %>%
  group_by(week_start, year, Swabs.result) %>%
  summarise(study_id_count = n_distinct(study_id2), .groups = 'drop')


ggplot(data_count, aes(x = week_start, y = study_id_count, fill = Swabs.result)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(x = "Date of Hospital Admission", y = "Number of Enrollments", fill = "Patient Swab Result") +
  theme_prism() + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(natparks.pals("Yellowstone", 4),'grey80'), 
                    breaks = c("CRE acquisition on hospital discharge","CRE acqusition on SICU discharge",
                               "CRE positive on admission to SICU","Negative on admission and did not acquire CRE during hospital stay",
                               "Lost to attrition")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) 

```


#Figure 3a
```{r}
#---------------------ARG BURDEN---------------------
# Count the number of AMR genes per Sample
amr_gene_count <- amrfinder_metadata %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarize(AMR_gene_count = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

amr_gene_count <- metadata %>%
  left_join(amr_gene_count, by = c("Sample" = "Name"))

amr_gene_count <- amr_gene_count[amr_gene_count$Category != "External isolate", ]
amr_gene_count <- amr_gene_count[!is.na(amr_gene_count$Category), ]


Category_comparisons <- combn(unique(amr_gene_count$Category), 2, simplify = FALSE)

ggplot(amr_gene_count, aes(x = Category, y = AMR_gene_count)) +
  geom_violin(aes(fill = Category), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Category), alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.4, color = "black") +  
  stat_compare_means(
  comparisons = Category_comparisons,
  method = "wilcox.test",
  p.adjust.method = "bonferroni",
  label = "p.signif",       # Show significance stars
  hide.ns = TRUE  , 
  size = 6# Hide non-significant comparisons
)+

  theme_prism() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")+
  ylim(0, 50) +  # Set y-axis limits from 0 to 50
  labs(
    title = "ARG Burden per Isolation Source",
    x = "Isolation Source",
    y = "ARG Burden"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "Community" = "CA",
    "Environmental swab" = "E",
    "Healthcare associated" = "HCA",
    "Hospital acquired" = "HA"
  ))

```


#Figure 3c
```{r}
#---------------------UPSET---------------------
amrfinder_metadata_carbapenems <- amrfinder_metadata %>% 
  filter(Subclass == "CARBAPENEM")

genes <- unique(amrfinder_metadata_carbapenems$`Gene symbol`)
names <- unique(amrfinder_metadata_carbapenems$Name)
presence_absence_df <- data.frame(Name.X = names)
for (gene in genes) {
  presence_absence_df[[gene]] <- 0
}
for (i in 1:nrow(amrfinder_metadata_carbapenems)) {
  name <- amrfinder_metadata_carbapenems$Name[i]
  gene <- amrfinder_metadata_carbapenems$`Gene symbol`[i]
  presence_absence_df[presence_absence_df$Name == name, gene] <- 1
}
classes = colnames(presence_absence_df[-1])

presence_absence_df_with_metadata <- presence_absence_df %>%
  inner_join(metadata, by = c("Name.X" = "Sample"))


color_legend <- setNames(names(colors), names(colors))  # Original color names

upset(presence_absence_df_with_metadata, 
      classes, 
      name = 'Antibiotic Class',  
      base_annotations = list(
        'Number of Isolates' = intersection_size(
          counts = FALSE, 
          mapping = aes(fill = Category)
        ) + 
          scale_fill_manual(values = colors, 
                            breaks = names(colors), 
                            labels = color_legend) + 
          facet_grid(genus ~ .) +
          theme_prism() +
          theme(
            strip.text.y  = element_text(angle = 0),
            axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks.x  = element_blank()
          )
      ), 
      width_ratio  = 0.2, 
      height_ratio = 0.2, 
      set_sizes = (
        upset_set_size() +
          theme_prism() +
          theme(
            axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
            axis.ticks.x = element_line()
          ) +
          ylab('') +
          xlab('')
      ),
      themes = upset_modify_themes(list(
        'intersections_matrix' = theme_prism(),
        'overall_sizes'        = theme_prism()
      ))
)
```


#Figure S3
```{r}
#---------------------AST---------------------

AST_merged <- bind_rows(AST_patient, AST_environmental)
AST_merged$`WGS ID`<- gsub("[-_]", "", AST_merged$`WGS ID`)



metadata <- metadata %>% filter(`Keep?` == "Y")
metadata$Sample <- gsub("[-_]", "", metadata$Sample)


AST_merged <- AST_merged %>% left_join(metadata, by = c("WGS ID" = "Sample"))
AST_merged <- AST_merged %>% filter(`Keep?` == "Y")

interp_cols <- grep("_Interpretation$", colnames(AST_merged), value = TRUE)



ast_long <- AST_merged %>%
  select(`CRESCENT ID`, `WGS ID`, `Organism`, `Location`, any_of("Category"), all_of(interp_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(interp_cols),
               names_to = "Antibiotic",
               values_to = "Interpretation") %>%
  mutate(Antibiotic = gsub("_Interpretation$", "", Antibiotic))

ast_long <- ast_long %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ gsub("\\*", "", .)))

ast_long <- ast_long %>%
  mutate(Interpretation = gsub("SSD", "SDD", Interpretation))


ast_long_perc <- ast_long %>%
  group_by(Antibiotic, Category) %>%
  count(Interpretation) %>%
  mutate(percent = n / sum(n) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(ast_long_perc, aes(x = Antibiotic, y = percent, fill = Interpretation)) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack()) +
  facet_wrap(~Category) +
  labs(
    x = "Antibiotic",
    y = "Percentage of Isolates"
  ) +
  theme_prism() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5),  
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1))
```



#Figure S6
```{r}
#---------------------EXTERNAL ISOLATES---------------------

EX_amrfinder <- EX_amrfinder %>%
  filter(`Element type` == "AMR")



EX_metadata$Sample <- gsub("[.-]", "_", EX_metadata$Sample)
EX_amrfinder$Name <- gsub("[.-]", "_", EX_amrfinder$Name)

 EX_metadata <- EX_metadata %>%
  separate(Mash, into = c("genus", "species"), sep = " ", extra = "merge", remove = FALSE)

EX_metadata <- EX_metadata %>%
  mutate(Mash = case_when(
    Mash == "Klebsiella pneumoniae subsp. pneumoniae" ~ "Klebsiella pneumoniae",
    Mash == "Enterobacter cloacae subsp. cloacae" ~ "Enterobacter cloacae",
    Mash == "Escherichia coli K-12" ~ "Escherichia coli",
    TRUE ~ Mash
  ))

EX_amrfinder <- EX_amrfinder %>%
  filter(!grepl("Name", Name))

EX_amrfinder_EX_metadata <- EX_amrfinder %>%
  inner_join(EX_metadata, by = c("Name" = "Sample"))

EX_metadata$Sample <- gsub("[.-]", "_", EX_metadata$Sample)

amr_gene_count <- EX_amrfinder_EX_metadata %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarize(AMR_gene_count = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

amr_gene_count <- EX_metadata %>%
  left_join(amr_gene_count, by = c("Sample" = "Name"))

Category_comparisons <- combn(unique(amr_gene_count$Category), 2, simplify = FALSE)

ggplot(amr_gene_count, aes(x = Category, y = AMR_gene_count)) +
geom_violin(aes(fill = Category), alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Category), alpha = 0.6)+
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.4, color = "black") +  
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = Category_comparisons, method = "wilcox.test", p.adjust.method = "bonferroni", hide.ns = TRUE) +  
  facet_wrap(~ genus) + 
  theme_prism() +
  ylim(0, 50) + 
  labs(
    title = "ARG Burden per Isolation Source",
    x = "Isolation Source",
    y = "ARG Burden"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colors)






```
